headline: Flagstar Bank's Technology Expansion: A Step Toward Strategic Growth
summary: FLG expands tech leadership to power its S2 platform, aiming to unify systems, boost AI-driven insights and enhance customer experience.

headline: Cognizant Earns Great Place To Work® Certification™ in 31 Countries
summary: Cognizant (NASDAQ:CTSH) has been Certified™ by Great Place To Work® in 31 countries worldwide, representing approximately 98% of its employee population. The prestigious award is based entirely on what current employees say about their experience working at Cognizant.
